name: Agentic Orchestration
description: Replaces OpenClaw's native LLM call with a deterministic multi-agent workflow via CrewAI. Auto-installs and starts the agentic-orchestration backend sidecar. Supports model-agnostic routing (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic), MCP tools, and session-persistent memory.

endpoint.description: URL of the agentic-orchestration HTTP endpoint (overridden automatically when managedBackend is true)

apiKey.description: Optional bearer token matching AGENTIC_ORCHESTRATE_API_KEY in the web server

timeoutMs.description: Max wait time in milliseconds for the orchestration backend to respond

runMode.description: dynamic = single planning pass; dynamic-iterative = re-plans between steps

sessionPassthrough.description: Pass OpenClaw sessionKey to agentic-orchestration so memory persists across turns

fallbackOnError.description: If true, fall through to OpenClaw's native LLM on backend failure. If false, surface the error as a reply.

verboseCrew.description: Pass --verbose to CrewAI (useful for debugging; verbose output included in reply)

managedBackend.description: Download agentic-orchestration and start agentic-orchestration-web as a plugin worker

repoUrl.description: Git URL used when no local checkout is found

installDir.description: Optional override for sidecar install root (default: <openclaw-state>/agentic-orchestration)

preferLocalCheckout.description: Prefer a sibling/local agentic-orchestration checkout when present

autoUpdate.description: Re-download the GitHub source archive on start when using the managed checkout

backendHost.description: Bind host for the managed web server

backendPort.description: Bind port for the managed web server

bootstrapTimeoutMs.description: Max wait for clone, dependency install, and health check

syncOpenClawMcp.description: Map OpenClaw mcp.servers into AO MCP provider YAML fragments (AO launches them). Set false to disable.

injectOpenClawContext.description: Inject OpenClaw workspace bootstrap, memory, and skill summaries into each orchestrate prompt

bridgeOpenClawTools.description: Host a loopback MCP that proxies OpenClaw browser/exec/nodes/memory tools into AO

bridgePort.description: Loopback port for the OpenClaw tool bridge control plane

fallthroughAutomation.description: Let native OpenClaw handle cron/heartbeat sessions instead of AO

selectedAgentProviderIds.description: Optional agent_provider id allowlist for dynamic planning
